title: Skin Stealer
description: A simple mod that allows you to steal players' skins during gameplay.
body:
**A simple mod that allows you to steal other players' skins during gameplay.**

**Controls:**

Press right CTRL to activate the player selection mode to copy the skin.

Press right ALT next to the selected player to steal their skin. Their skin will appear on your desktop.

 You can reassign keys in the game settings.


You can also use the /steal command to steal a specific player's skin in the chunk loading area.

Example usage:

/steal Player_Name
